name: Algorithms
description: Core concepts of computation and problem-solving strategies.

codeSnippets.title: Python Merge Sort
codeSnippets.code:
def merge_sort(arr):
    if len(arr) > 1:
        mid = len(arr) // 2
        L = arr[:mid]
        R = arr[mid:]
        merge_sort(L)
        merge_sort(R)
        # ... (merge logic)
        i = j = k = 0
        while i < len(L) and j < len(R):
            if L[i] < R[j]:
                arr[k] = L[i]
                i += 1
            else:
                arr[k] = R[j]
                j += 1
            k += 1
        while i < len(L):
            arr[k] = L[i]
            i += 1
            k += 1
        while j < len(R):
            arr[k] = R[j]
            j += 1
            k += 1

body.raw: Delve into the fundamental building blocks of computation. This section explores various algorithmic paradigms, data structures, and complexity analysis essential for efficient problem-solving in computer science.
body.html: Delve into the fundamental building blocks of computation. This section explores various algorithmic paradigms, data structures, and complexity analysis essential for efficient problem-solving in computer science.

name: Backend Development
title: Backend Development
description: A guide to server-side technologies, databases, and APIs for building robust web applications.

body.raw: Learn how to build the logic and data management that powers web applications from behind the scenes. This roadmap covers languages, frameworks, databases, and architectural patterns.
body.html: Learn how to build the logic and data management that powers web applications from behind the scenes. This roadmap covers languages, frameworks, databases, and architectural patterns.

name: Compiler Theory
description: The art of translating high-level code to machine instructions.

body.raw: Uncover the magic behind compilers. Learn about lexical analysis, parsing, semantic analysis, code generation, and optimization techniques that transform source code into executable programs.
body.html: Uncover the magic behind compilers. Learn about lexical analysis, parsing, semantic analysis, code generation, and optimization techniques that transform source code into executable programs.

name: Cybersecurity
description: An in-depth guide to protecting systems, networks, and data from digital threats.

body.raw: Understand the principles and practices of cybersecurity. This section covers cryptography, network security, ethical hacking, and threat modeling to protect digital assets.
body.html: Understand the principles and practices of cybersecurity. This section covers cryptography, network security, ethical hacking, and threat modeling to protect digital assets.

name: DevOps
description: A roadmap of the practices and tools that bridge software development and IT operations.

body.raw: Explore the world of DevOps to learn how to improve the speed and quality of software development through automation, continuous integration, and continuous delivery (CI/CD). This roadmap outlines the key stages of the DevOps lifecycle, from planning to monitoring.
body.html: Explore the world of DevOps to learn how to improve the speed and quality of software development through automation, continuous integration, and continuous delivery (CI/CD). This roadmap outlines the key stages of the DevOps lifecycle, from planning to monitoring.

name: Frontend Development
description: A roadmap to building modern, interactive user interfaces for the web.

body.raw: Master the technologies of the browser. This roadmap covers the essential languages (HTML, CSS, JavaScript) and frameworks (like React) for creating beautiful and responsive websites.
body.html: Master the technologies of the browser. This roadmap covers the essential languages (HTML, CSS, JavaScript) and frameworks (like React) for creating beautiful and responsive websites.

body.raw: Explore the theoretical foundations of computation and formal languages. This section delves into automata theory, grammars, Turing machines, and the limits of what can be computed.
body.html: Explore the theoretical foundations of computation and formal languages. This section delves into automata theory, grammars, Turing machines, and the limits of what can be computed.

name: Machine Learning
description: Algorithms that learn from and make decisions based on data.

body.raw: Dive into the field of Machine Learning, where algorithms enable systems to learn from data. Topics include supervised, unsupervised learning, neural networks, and model evaluation.
body.html: Dive into the field of Machine Learning, where algorithms enable systems to learn from data. Topics include supervised, unsupervised learning, neural networks, and model evaluation.

name: Operating Systems
description: Software managing computer hardware and resources.

body.raw: Explore the intricate world of operating systems, the foundational software that bridges hardware and applications. Learn about process management, memory allocation, file systems, and concurrency.
body.html: Explore the intricate world of operating systems, the foundational software that bridges hardware and applications. Learn about process management, memory allocation, file systems, and concurrency.
